topics.title: Earthquake Discusses Divorce and Management Issues

topics.title: Aspiring DJ Interview
topics.summary: The studio hosts a high school student who shares his demo tape and aspirations of becoming a professional radio broadcaster.

topics.title: Gossip Game and Historical Confusion
topics.summary: The show features a segment where guests play a gossip game with Mike Walker followed by a comedic discussion regarding Sal's lack of historical knowledge concerning Buzz Aldrin and U.S. presidents.

topics.title: History Quiz and News Segment
topics.summary: The studio features a segment where a caller is quizzed on American history and science before transitioning to a news report regarding local business disputes and a video golf caddy invention.

topics.title: Robin Quivers and Jimmy Florentine Dating Rumors
topics.summary: The studio discusses the potential romance between Robin Quivers and Jimmy Florentine, including a fan poll regarding their relationship and the upcoming news coverage of their possible date.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Health Warnings
topics.summary: The studio discusses celebrity news regarding Courtney Love, Britney Spears, and Mary-Kate Olsen, alongside a report on thyroid disease in cats linked to flame retardants.

topics.title: Elvis Presley and Priscilla Presley Retrospective
topics.summary: The studio discusses the history of Priscilla Presley's marriage to Elvis, the safety risks of extreme roller coasters, and upcoming comedy tour dates.
